# Preface {.unnumbered}

::: {.callout-warning}
We're in the process of finalizing this guide; content can undergo (minor) changes.
:::


### Funding
::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-6}
![](/images/EN_Co-fundedbytheEU_RGB_POS.svg){width=100%}
:::
::: {.g-col-6 .small}
This partnership has received funding from the European Union’s Horizon Europe research and innovation programme under Grant Agreement No 101057014.
:::
:::
